hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git +(reset +--hard|clean +-[a-z]*f|push +.*--force(-with-lease)?|branch +-D)' && { echo 'BLOCKED: destructive git op. Re-run with explicit user approval.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0

path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$path" in *.py) uvx --quiet ruff format "$path" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; *.cpp|*.cc|*.h|*.hpp|*.c) clang-format -i "$path" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
